neighborhoods.name: Centro / Quinta Avenida
neighborhoods.description: Pedestrian 5th Avenue with international restaurants, shops, and Caribbean beach access
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Playa del Carmen. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Playa del Carmen

neighborhoods.name: Playacar
neighborhoods.description: Gated resort community south of town with golf course, ruins, and beachfront properties
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Playa del Carmen's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Playa del Carmen

neighborhoods.name: Playa del Carmen Norte / Colosio
neighborhoods.description: Northern neighborhoods developing rapidly with more local character and lower costs

housing.predominantType: New construction condos and modest apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Playa del Carmen

neighborhoods.name: Riviera Maya (Puerto Aventuras / Akumal)
neighborhoods.description: Coastal communities south of Playa with marina, snorkeling, and established expat communities
neighborhoods.character: Coastal communities, marina, snorkeling, expat social

housing.predominantType: Resort condos, beachfront houses, and marina properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Playa del Carmen
